mapper.sql: select rule_id, rule_name, sop_class_uid, sop_name, modality, rule_type, tag_code, tag_display, tag_name, vr, private_creator, allow_blank, severity, enabled, sort_order, fail_message, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from dcm_validation_rule
mapper.select: where enabled = 'Y' and rule_type = 1 and (sop_class_uid = #{sopClassUid} or sop_class_uid = '*') order by sort_order asc, rule_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into dcm_validation_rule (rule_name, sop_class_uid, sop_name, modality, rule_type, tag_code, tag_display, tag_name, vr, private_creator, allow_blank, severity, enabled, sort_order, fail_message, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{ruleName}, #{sopClassUid}, #{sopName}, #{modality}, #{ruleType}, #{tagCode}, #{tagDisplay}, #{tagName}, #{vr}, #{privateCreator}, #{allowBlank}, #{severity}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}, #{failMessage}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update dcm_validation_rule set rule_name = #{ruleName}, sop_class_uid = #{sopClassUid}, sop_name = #{sopName}, modality = #{modality}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, tag_code = #{tagCode}, tag_display = #{tagDisplay}, tag_name = #{tagName}, vr = #{vr}, private_creator = #{privateCreator}, allow_blank = #{allowBlank}, severity = #{severity}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, fail_message = #{failMessage}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where rule_id = #{ruleId}
